hooks.command: if [ -n "$LITELLM_KEY" ]; then SETTINGS="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/settings.json"; if [ -f "$SETTINGS" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq --arg key "$LITELLM_KEY" '.env.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN = $key' "$SETTINGS" > "$SETTINGS.tmp" && mv "$SETTINGS.tmp" "$SETTINGS"; fi; fi
